entry: TBD - No confirmed M15 entry model

three_layer_analysis.l1_daily: D1 uptrend intact (HH/HL from 26399 Apr 20 low). Current dealing range: 28595.8 (May 18 swing low) to 30328.8 (May 29 ATH). Price at 30284 = 97.7% Fib (deep Premium). No SMT divergence — NAS100 and US500 both making HH/HL in sync (NAS100: 30295→30324→30328; US500: 7580→7585). Today's D1 candle: O:30281.9, H:30324.3, L:30171.7, range=152.4 pts. Overnight sweep of 30171 recovered to open — Judas swing candidate. Candle is early, small body, near open — indecision at ATH.
three_layer_analysis.l2_h4_context: H4 dealing range: 28595.8 to 30328.8. Price interacting with extreme Premium. Recent H4 candles show compression into highs: May 27 14:00 NY (O:30011, H:30295, L:29833, C:29924) created bearish rejection candle. May 28 14:00 NY (O:29945, H:30295, C:30272) bullish expansion to new high. No clear bearish OB yet at these levels — price is in uncharted territory. CRT defined by H4 06:00-10:00 NY candles. Price has NOT been purged from current H4 range — still building.
three_layer_analysis.l3_m15_entry: No M15 entry model confirmed. Overnight session: opened 30281.9, swept low to 30171.7 (01:00 UTC / 21:00 NY), recovered to 30284 by London open. Asian range: 30171-30273 (102 pts). London session (02:00-06:00 UTC): gradual grind up from 30203 to 30273, no strong directional move. NY pre-market (06:00-10:00 UTC): pushed to 30324 then pulled back to 30284. Kill Zone status: London KZ ending (02:00-05:00 NY = 06:00-09:00 UTC), NY AM KZ starts in ~2hrs (08:30 NY = 12:30 UTC). No M15 OB formed — need MSS + FVG + OB confirmation. Compression detected: avg M15 range 30-50 pts overnight vs 200-400 pts on May 27-28 H4 candles — expansion likely on NY open.

reasoning: NEUTRAL bias with bearish lean. Price is at 97.7% of the D1 dealing range (28595→30328) — deep in Premium where smart money distributes. However, there is NO confirmed reversal signal: (1) No SMT divergence between NAS100 and US500 — both making HH/HL in lockstep, confirming bullish momentum. (2) No M15 bearish order block with market structure shift — the overnight sweep to 30171 was quickly recovered, suggesting buyers still active. (3) No ICT bearish reversal candle pattern on D1 yet — today's candle is still forming and looks like indecision at ATH. (4) Friday profile: after 4 days of bullish expansion (Mon-Thu rally from 29666→30328), Friday often sees profit-taking OR continuation. Without a clear Judas swing (fake move in opposite direction of true bias) and Kill Zone reaction, we cannot anticipate direction. Key watch: NY AM Kill Zone (08:30-11:00 NY) for MSS. If price sweeps 30328 high then drops through 30250 with displacement, that creates bearish setup targeting 30171→29992. If price holds above 30250 and breaks 30328, continuation to unknown levels. ORB Score 46/100 reflects: strong HTF bias (18/25) but missing VWAP (0/15), weak volume confirmation (8/20), no ICT confluence (3/15), good range width (10/10), moderate candle/timing (7/15). Confidence 40/100 — too many unknowns for a definitive call.
